/home/phil/venv/bin/python3 -c "
import json, os, psycopg2
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv('/home/phil/palanthai/config/.env')

keyword = '={{ $json.keyword }}'
brand = '={{ $json.brand }}'

conn = psycopg2.connect(os.getenv('VPS_PG_URL'))
cur = conn.cursor()
cur.execute(\"SELECT id, status FROM content_queue WHERE keyword=%s AND brand=%s AND status NOT IN ('rejected', 'published') LIMIT 1\", (keyword, brand))
row = cur.fetchone()
cur.close()
conn.close()

if row:
    print(json.dumps({'exists': True, 'queue_id': str(row[0]), 'status': row[1]}))
else:
    print(json.dumps({'exists': False}))
"

/home/phil/venv/bin/python3 -c "
import json, os, psycopg2
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv('/home/phil/palanthai/config/.env')

conn = psycopg2.connect(os.getenv('VPS_PG_URL'))
cur = conn.cursor()
cur.execute(\"\"\"
INSERT INTO content_queue (keyword, brand, content_type, priority, status, source, notes)
VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, 'pending', %s, %s)
RETURNING id
\"\"\",
('={{ $json.keyword }}', '={{ $json.brand }}', '={{ $json.content_type }}',
 {{ $json.priority }}, 'gdrive', '={{ $json.notes.replace("'",'') }}')
)
new_id = cur.fetchone()[0]
conn.commit()
cur.close()
conn.close()
print(json.dumps({'ok': True, 'queue_id': str(new_id), 'keyword': '={{ $json.keyword }}'}))
"
